nodes.context: Umbrella term for Romanian organized crime groups active in Europe and the Americas, involved in human trafficking, drug trafficking, and financial crimes.
Romanian criminal group in Turin, Italy, specialized in extortion, robbery, and drug trafficking.
Mexican drug cartel; Romanian mafia in the Americas has a lucrative pact with them.
Italian mafia organization; Romanian mafia collaborates with them for drug distribution in Europe.
Romanian crime group active in Pantelimon, Sector 2, and Cluj-Napoca, involved in usury and prostitution.
Romanian crime group with influence in local government and law enforcement, involved in blackmail, usury, and protection rackets.
Romanian crime group operating in Sectors 1 and 4, involved in cigarette smuggling and real estate.
Romanian crime group controlling Sector 3, involved in usury, drug trafficking, and prostitution.
Romanian crime group active in Sectors 2 and 6, involved in prostitution, usury, and blackmail.
Romanian crime group led by Nuțu Cămătaru, involved in usury, prostitution, and blackmail.
Romanian crime group active in Sectors 4 and 5, specializing in drug trafficking and prostitution internationally.
Romanian crime group based in Sector 6, involved in protection rackets, debt collection, and real estate.
Romanian crime group led by Vasile Domnu, controlling prostitution in Bucharest's Gara de Nord area.
Romanian crime group involved in a feud with the Domnu clan.
Romanian crime group led by Nuțu and Sile Cămătaru, involved in usury and extortion.

edges.context: Romanian mafia in the Americas has built a lucrative pact with the Sinaloa Cartel.
Romanian mafia collaborates with 'Ndrangheta to distribute narcotics throughout Europe.
Brigada Oarza is a Romanian criminal group operating in Italy, part of the broader Romanian mafia.
Vancică clan formed an alliance with Sportivilor clan to challenge the Cămătari clan.
Vancică clan expanded into Cămătari territories after their imprisonment, leading to rivalry.
Domnu clan was involved in a violent feud with the Sadoveanu clan.
